meta.description:
This AI Tool Turns Dead videos into viral videos | Tajai AI tutorial
Get a 7 Day FREE Trial 👉 https://www.taja.ai/?utm_campaign=dk

If you want to optimize your YouTube  SEO,  create shorts and make thumbnails with the help of AI then this took Taja.ai is for you. In this Taja.ai tutorial I walk you through how to use it to optimize your youtube videos to rank higher, to create viral shorts and to make thumbnails with AI.

You can use Taja.ai for your YouTube SEO, before you start uploading it and you can also revive your dead videos with this tool. 

You can get started with Taja.ai for free with a 7 day free trial.
👉 https://www.taja.ai/?utm_campaign=dk
